input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.1.2
            TITLE: measurements will be made with a free field microphone placed:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.1.2: Measurements will be made with a free field microphone placed:
IN.10.1.2 Measurements will be made with a free field microphone placed:  
• free from obstructions  
• at the Exhaust Outlet vertical level  IC.7.2.2 
• 0.5 m from the end of the Exhaust Outlet  IC.7.2.2 
• at an angle of 45° with the outlet in the horizontal plane (see IN.10.2.2 below)

final_answer: Measurements will be made with a free field microphone placed: • free from obstructions • at the Exhaust Outlet vertical level IC.7.2.2 • 0.5 m from the end of the Exhaust Outlet IC.7.2.2 • at an angle of 45° with the outlet in the horizontal plane (see IN.10.2.2 below)
